testsuite.name: Storage Layer Integration

testcase.name: should track operations and cleanup correctly
should fail recovery when too many shards are lost
should perform full async ingest and retrieve cycle with progress
should recover from partial shard loss using erasure coding

testsuite.system-out: On-The-Fly Repair logic successfully resolved and persisted missing shard for chunk: 91aef06dbab4a88b2c81b257a90973b62961b4aeb94b801f7544b060d40059f4 On-The-Fly Repair logic successfully resolved and persisted missing shard for chunk: bb9f62228bf6599c7792db934f88ed384bf166c0846e71c2374952f7bac88962
